creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: cpm
Date: Fri Oct 28 00:03:31 UTC 2016
New revision: 424797
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/424797

Log:
  net/pygopherd: modernize port

  - Add LICENSE and LICENSE_FILE
  - Remove unnecessary PYDISTUTILS_PKGVERSION
  - Add NO_ARCH
  - Regenerate patches with make makepatch
  - Record TIMESTAMP in distinfo
  - Fix pkg-plist
  - Take maintainership
  - Bump PORTREVISION

  PR:		213539
  Submitted by:	Neel Chauhan <neel@neelc.org>
  Approved by:	koobs (mentor)

Changes:
  head/net/pygopherd/Makefile
  head/net/pygopherd/distinfo
  head/net/pygopherd/files/patch-bin_pygopherd
  head/net/pygopherd/files/patch-conf_pygopherd.conf
  head/net/pygopherd/files/patch-doc__pygopherd.8
  head/net/pygopherd/files/patch-pygopherd
  head/net/pygopherd/files/patch-pygopherd.conf
  head/net/pygopherd/files/patch-setup.py
  head/net/pygopherd/pkg-plist
